get.summary:
Lists every role a user holds within the caller's organization, each tagged with the scope
(project or org) it's held at.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user whose role assignments to list.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of assignments to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

get.summary: Lists the custom roles owned by the organization of the caller's current project.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of roles to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

post.summary: Creates a new custom role, owned by the organization of the caller's current project.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The role to create.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the role to delete.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

post.summary: Adds and/or removes permissions from a custom role's permission set.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the role to modify.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

parameters.name: role.id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the role. Output only.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The role to update. The role's `id` identifies which role to update.

permissions.description:
Names of the permissions to grant this role on create or update. Input only — never
populated on a Role returned by this service; see ListRolePermissions for reading a role's
current permission set.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the role was created. Output only.

updateTime.description: Timestamp when the role was last updated. Output only.

etag.description:
The ETag for the current version of the role. Helps to prevent
simultaneous updates of a role from overwriting each other ("mid-air
collisions").

If this is provided on update, it must match the server's ETag.

schema.title: The role to update. The role's `id` identifies which role to update.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

get.summary: Lists the names of the permissions currently granted to a custom role.

parameters.name: roleId
parameters.description: The ID of the role whose permissions to list.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of permissions to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

post.summary: Assigns a role to a user, scoped to a project or an organization.
post.description:
Assigning at org scope, when the user already holds this role at project scope for one or
more projects under that org, deletes those project-scope grants and inserts the org-scope
grant in the same transaction — org scope already implies the role at every project under it,
so the narrower grants become redundant.

Assigning at project scope is rejected if the user already holds this role at the project's
org scope: there's no legitimate reason to add a narrower grant when a broader one already
covers it. Call this again with org_id set instead of project_id to promote an existing
project-scope grant to org scope.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
Request message for assigning a role to a user. Exactly one of project_id or org_id must be
set, selecting the scope the assignment applies to.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

get.summary: Lists the names of every permission that can be assigned to a custom role.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

post.summary: Unassigns a role from a user.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
Request message for unassigning a role from a user. Exactly one of project_id or org_id must
be set, selecting the scope the assignment applies to.

parameters.name: x-project-id
parameters.description: ID of the project this request operates in.

addPermissions.description:
Permission names to add to the role's permission set. Must not overlap with
remove_permissions.

removePermissions.description:
Permission names to remove from the role's permission set. Must not overlap with
add_permissions.

RoleServiceModifyRolePermissionsBody.description:
Request message for adding and/or removing permissions from a role's permission set. Adding a
permission the role already has, or removing one it doesn't have, is a no-op.

roleId.description: The ID of the role to assign.

userId.description: The ID of the user to assign the role to.

projectId.description: Assign the role for a single project.

orgId.description: Assign the role for every project under an organization.

v1AssignRoleRequest.description:
Request message for assigning a role to a user. Exactly one of project_id or org_id must be
set, selecting the scope the assignment applies to.

permissions.description: Names of every permission that can be assigned to a custom role.

v1ListAssignablePermissionsResponse.description: Response message for listing assignable permissions.

assignments.description: List of role assignments returned in the response.

totalSize.description: Total number of role assignments the user holds within the caller's organization.

nextPageToken.description: Token for fetching the next page of results, if applicable.

v1ListRoleAssignmentsResponse.description: Response message for listing a user's role assignments.

permissions.description: Names of the permissions currently granted to the role.

totalSize.description: Total number of permissions currently granted to the role.

nextPageToken.description: Token for fetching the next page of results, if applicable.

v1ListRolePermissionsResponse.description: Response message for listing a role's permissions.

roles.description: List of roles returned in the response.

totalSize.description: Total number of roles visible to the caller's organization.

nextPageToken.description: Token for fetching the next page of results, if applicable.

id.description: Unique identifier for the role. Output only.

permissions.description:
Names of the permissions to grant this role on create or update. Input only — never
populated on a Role returned by this service; see ListRolePermissions for reading a role's
current permission set.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the role was created. Output only.

updateTime.description: Timestamp when the role was last updated. Output only.

etag.description:
The ETag for the current version of the role. Helps to prevent
simultaneous updates of a role from overwriting each other ("mid-air
collisions").

If this is provided on update, it must match the server's ETag.

v1Role.description: Role represents a custom role, owned by the caller's organization.

projectId.description: The role is held for a single project.

orgId.description: The role is held for every project under an organization.

v1RoleAssignment.description:
RoleAssignment is a role a user holds at a particular scope. Exactly one of project_id or
org_id is set, identifying the scope.

v1RoleAssignmentFilter.description:
RoleAssignmentFilter specifies criteria for filtering role assignments in a ListRoleAssignments
request. Reserved for future filter criteria; it has no fields yet.

v1RoleFilter.description:
RoleFilter specifies criteria for filtering roles in a ListRoles request. Reserved for future
filter criteria; it has no fields yet.

roleId.description: The ID of the role to unassign.

userId.description: The ID of the user to unassign the role from.

projectId.description: Unassign the role for a single project.

orgId.description: Unassign the role for every project under an organization.

v1UnassignRoleRequest.description:
Request message for unassigning a role from a user. Exactly one of project_id or org_id must
be set, selecting the scope the assignment applies to.

BearerAuth.description: Access token from VerifyMagicLink or RefreshAccessToken. Format: 'Bearer {token}'
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
